title: Find Zombie Processes
description:
Parse `ps aux` output. The STAT column (index 7, 0-based) contains 'Z' for zombie processes. The PID is column index 1.

Return zombie PIDs sorted ascending, one per line. Return empty string if none found.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
USER       PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ   RSS TTY      STAT START   TIME COMMAND
root         1  0.0  0.1  19356  1544 ?        Ss   10:00   0:01 /sbin/init
www-data  1234  0.0  0.0      0     0 ?        Z    10:01   0:00 [nginx] <defunct>
www-data  5678  0.1  0.2  12345  2048 ?        S    10:02   0:05 nginx: worker
